tasks.description: Rewrite apps/server/src/llm/OpenRouterClient.ts: replace the hand-rolled HttpClientRequest/HttpClientResponse implementation with OpenAiClient.layer({ apiUrl: 'https://openrouter.ai/api/v1', apiKey: Redacted.make(...) }) + OpenAiLanguageModel.layer({ model: modelId }). Export a new LlmClient service (ServiceMap.Service) whose complete(messages) method calls LanguageModel.generateText({ prompt: Prompt.make(messages) }) and returns response.text. Keep the LlmError class and ChatMessage type for backward-compat with callers. The layer must compose OpenAiClient.layer + OpenAiLanguageModel.layer and require only HttpClient.HttpClient.
tasks.acceptance: TypeScript compiles; OpenRouterClient.layer no longer uses HttpClientRequest.post manually; generateText from effect/unstable/ai is used for completions.

tasks.description: Update apps/server/src/index.ts appLayer: replace the manual OpenRouterClient.layer composition with the new layer that wraps OpenAiClient.layer + OpenAiLanguageModel.layer. The modelId must still be read from process.env LLM_MODEL at runtime. Ensure Layer.mergeAll still provides BunServices, BunHttpClient, and OpenRouterClient.
tasks.acceptance: bun run type-check passes; appLayer still compiles and provides all required services.

phases.name: Wire LanguageModel into LambdaRlm and Check

tasks.description: Update apps/server/src/rlm/LambdaRlm.ts: replace every yield* client.complete(modelId, messages) call with yield* LanguageModel.generateText({ prompt: Prompt.make(messages) }).pipe(Effect.map(r => r.text)). Remove the modelId threading — model selection is now handled by the layer. Update the PhiEffect type alias to use AiError from effect/unstable/ai/AiError instead of the custom LlmError in the error channel. Keep LlmError for the absorb boundary where errors are converted to failed LlmCheckResult.
tasks.acceptance: TypeScript compiles; LambdaRlm.ts no longer imports OpenRouterClient directly; uses LanguageModel from effect/unstable/ai.

tasks.description: Update apps/server/src/check/Check.ts runTaskWithLlm: replace yield* client.complete(modelId, [...]) with yield* LanguageModel.generateText({ prompt: buildSolvePrompt(task) }).pipe(Effect.map(r => r.text)). Remove the modelId parameter from runTaskWithLlm and runAllTasksForModel signatures since model selection is now done at the layer level. Update callers in ModelEvalRunner accordingly.
tasks.acceptance: TypeScript compiles; runTaskWithLlm no longer takes modelId; LanguageModel service is in the requirement channel.

tasks.description: Update apps/server/src/eval/ModelEvalRunner.ts: remove modelId threading through runModelEval, runRlmForAllTasks, runAllTasksForModel. Instead, build a per-model LanguageModel layer inside runModelEval using OpenAiLanguageModel.layer({ model: model.modelId }) and provide it to the inner effects with Effect.provide. This is the correct Effect pattern: one layer per model evaluation run.
tasks.acceptance: TypeScript compiles; runModelEval creates a fresh LanguageModel layer per model and provides it; no modelId parameter flows through Check or RLM functions.

tasks.description: Flesh out packages/ai/src/LanguageModel.ts: replace the Layer.empty stubs with real layers. SmartModelLive = OpenAiLanguageModel.layer({ model: 'gpt-4.1' }) provided over OpenAiClient.layer({ apiUrl: 'https://openrouter.ai/api/v1', apiKey }). FastModelLive = same with 'gpt-4.1-mini'. EmbeddingModelLive = OpenAiEmbeddingModel.layer({ model: 'text-embedding-3-small' }) over same client. Export all three layers from packages/ai/src/index.ts.
tasks.acceptance: bun run type-check passes on @repo/ai package; layers are real, not Layer.empty.

tasks.description: Update apps/server/src/llm/OpenRouterClient.test.ts: replace the mockHttpLayer pattern that intercepts HttpClientRequest with a mock LanguageModel layer (Layer.succeed(LanguageModel.LanguageModel, mockService)) where mockService.generateText returns a fixed GenerateTextResponse. Update all test cases to verify via the LanguageModel interface rather than raw HTTP interception. The Authorization header test becomes a test that the layer is configured with the correct apiKey.
tasks.acceptance: All server tests pass: bun test --filter=server -- src/llm/OpenRouterClient.test.ts

tasks.description: Rewrite apps/server/src/llm/OpenRouterClient.ts: replace the hand-rolled HttpClientRequest/HttpClientResponse implementation with OpenAiClient.layer({ apiUrl: 'https://openrouter.ai/api/v1', apiKey: Redacted.make(...) }) + OpenAiLanguageModel.layer({ model: modelId }). Export a new LlmClient service (ServiceMap.Service) whose complete(messages) method calls LanguageModel.generateText({ prompt: Prompt.make(messages) }) and returns response.text. Keep the LlmError class and ChatMessage type for backward-compat with callers. The layer must compose OpenAiClient.layer + OpenAiLanguageModel.layer and require only HttpClient.HttpClient.
tasks.acceptance: TypeScript compiles; OpenRouterClient.layer no longer uses HttpClientRequest.post manually; generateText from effect/unstable/ai is used for completions.

tasks.description: Update apps/server/src/llm/OpenRouterClient.test.ts: replace the mockHttpLayer pattern that intercepts HttpClientRequest with a mock LanguageModel layer (Layer.succeed(LanguageModel.LanguageModel, mockService)) where mockService.generateText returns a fixed GenerateTextResponse. tasks.description: Rewrite apps/server/src/llm/OpenRouterClient.ts to be a thin layer factory: export OpenRouterClient as a Layer.Layer<LanguageModel.LanguageModel, never, HttpClient.HttpClient> that composes OpenAiClient.layer({ apiUrl: 'https://openrouter.ai/api/v1', apiKey: Redacted.make(process.env["OPENROUTER_API_KEY"] ?? "") }) with OpenAiLanguageModel.layer({ model }). The model argument must be passed in at construction time. Keep LlmError and ChatMessage exported for use in the absorb boundaries in LambdaRlm and Check. Remove the complete() service method entirely — callers will use LanguageModel.generateText directly.
tasks.acceptance: TypeScript compiles; OpenRouterClient.ts no longer uses HttpClientRequest.post; it exports a layer factory function makeOpenRouterLayer(modelId) returning Layer<LanguageModel, never, HttpClient>.

tasks.description: Update apps/server/src/index.ts appLayer: call makeOpenRouterLayer(process.env["LLM_MODEL"] ?? "minimax/minimax-m2.5:free") to get the LanguageModel layer. Compose it with BunServices and BunHttpClient in Layer.mergeAll. Remove the old OpenRouterClient.layer reference.
tasks.acceptance: bun run type-check passes; appLayer provides LanguageModel service; no reference to old OpenRouterClient service.

phases.name: Wire LanguageModel into LambdaRlm and Check

tasks.description: Update apps/server/src/rlm/LambdaRlm.ts: replace every (yield* OpenRouterClient).complete(modelId, messages) call with yield* LanguageModel.generateText({ prompt: messages[0]!.content }).pipe(Effect.map(r => r.text)). For multi-turn messages, use Prompt.make(messages) as the prompt input. Remove the modelId field from LambdaRlmConfig — model is now baked into the layer. Keep the absorbToCheckResult boundary unchanged (it catches unknown, so AiError is absorbed correctly). Update PhiEffect service requirements: replace OpenRouterClient with LanguageModel.LanguageModel.
tasks.acceptance: TypeScript compiles; LambdaRlm.ts imports LanguageModel from effect/unstable/ai; no reference to OpenRouterClient service; PhiEffect uses LanguageModel in requirement channel.

tasks.description: Update apps/server/src/check/Check.ts runTaskWithLlm: remove the modelId parameter. Replace (yield* OpenRouterClient).complete(modelId, [...]) with yield* LanguageModel.generateText({ prompt: buildSolvePrompt(task) }).pipe(Effect.map(r => r.text)). The AiError is caught at the existing Effect.catch boundary and replaced with the fallback lambda expression string. Update runAllTasksForModel signature to remove modelId param; update its call sites in ModelEvalRunner.
tasks.acceptance: TypeScript compiles; runTaskWithLlm and runAllTasksForModel no longer accept modelId; LanguageModel is in the requirement channel of both functions.

tasks.description: Update apps/server/src/eval/ModelEvalRunner.ts: inside runModelEval, build a per-model LanguageModel layer with makeOpenRouterLayer(model.modelId) and provide it to the runAllTasksForModel and runRlmForAllTasks calls via Effect.provide. Remove modelId threading from runRlmForAllTasks. This is the correct Effect pattern: compose a fresh layer per evaluation run rather than passing modelId as a parameter.
tasks.acceptance: TypeScript compiles; runModelEval creates makeOpenRouterLayer(model.modelId) and provides it; no modelId param flows through Check or RLM call chains.

tasks.description: Rewrite apps/server/src/llm/OpenRouterClient.test.ts: the old tests intercepted raw HTTP via mockHttpLayer. Replace with a mock LanguageModel layer: Layer.succeed(LanguageModel.LanguageModel, { generateText: () => Effect.succeed(mockResponse), generateObject: ..., streamText: ... }). Test that makeOpenRouterLayer(modelId) returns a Layer<LanguageModel>. Add an integration-style test (skipped by default) that actually calls OpenRouter with OPENROUTER_API_KEY from env.
tasks.acceptance: bun test --filter=server -- src/llm/OpenRouterClient.test.ts: all tests pass.
